queries.question: return the rating of each hotel
queries.sql: select h.name, r.Customer_Reviews from reviews r inner join hotels h on h.hotelid=r.hotelid
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?customer_reviews WHERE {
  ?r a :Reviews .
  ?h a :Hotels .
  ?r p:hasHotels ?h .
  ?h p:name ?name .
  ?r p:Customer_Reviews ?customer_reviews .
}

queries.question: return the rating of each hotel
queries.sql: select h.name, r.Number_Of_Stars from reviews r inner join hotels h on h.hotelid=r.hotelid
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?number_of_stars WHERE {
  ?r a :Reviews .
  ?h a :Hotels .
  ?r p:hasHotels ?h .
  ?h p:name ?name .
  ?r p:Number_Of_Stars ?number_of_stars .
}

queries.question: How many stars did each customer give?
queries.sql: select c.fullname, r.Number_Of_Stars from reviews r inner join Customers c on c.CustomerID =r. CustomerID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?number_of_stars WHERE {
  ?r a :Reviews .
  ?c a :Customers .
  ?r p:hasCustomers ?c .
  ?c p:name ?fullname .
  ?r p:Number_Of_Stars ?number_of_stars .
}
